╘═══☣️════════════💀════════════☣️═══╛

Surviving the Nightmare

As you enter the world of Resident Evil, you step into a realm where humanity teeters on the edge of extinction, threatened by sinister corporations and the biological horrors they've unleashed. Here, you'll navigate a landscape corrupted by viral outbreaks that transform ordinary people into mindless creatures hungering for flesh. Perhaps you're a member of special forces fighting to contain these threats, a survivor with immunity seeking answers about your condition, or a whistleblower determined to expose the dark truths behind pharmaceutical giants who place profit above human life.

Your journey will take you through diverse and treacherous environments—from abandoned mansions hiding terrible secrets in their winding corridors, to sterile underground laboratories where unspeakable experiments continue unchecked, decimated urban landscapes where danger lurks around every corner, and remote villages where ancient parasites have merge
